explanation: Mpox is a viral zoonotic disease that can spread from person to person. It leads to a painful rash, fever, and swollen lymph nodes.
whatToDo: Avoid close, skin-to-skin contact with infected individuals
Practice frequent hand hygiene with soap and water
Consult a doctor if you develop a new, unexplained rash
seeDoctorIf: You have been in contact with someone diagnosed with mpox
You develop painful blisters or skin lesions with fever
